name: Soy-Lemon Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients into a pint jar or cruet.
2. Stir or shake until blended and sugar dissolves.
3. Let stand for 30 minutes for the flavor to blend.
4. Just before serving, stir or shake and pour desired amount over assorted salad vegetables.
5. Toss to coat lettuce.
Makes about 1-1/2 cups.
